title: Chipped
body:
### Chipped ![Chipped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BAscRYKm/images/cbbeeca232f2632aef4ac4856f80c2e7566a4461.png) --- [![Made by Terrarium](https://images.teamresourceful.com/u/I80VLV.svg)](https://discord.terrarium.earth) [![Requires Resourceful Lib](https://images.teamresourceful.com/u/jUWHY2.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) [![Requires Athena](http://images.teamresourceful.com/u/TNilje.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm)
--- Have you ever wanted to build an epic castle with sandstone big bricks? Or maybe a nether fortress made out of pure magna? Perhaps you are just here to build a house out of dirt or a totem pole with the infamous dioritefaces? Either way we got you covered! Chipped is a 1.16+ building mod that expands on the variety of blocks you can use in-game. The mod offers over 11,000 unique building blocks, from stained glass variations all the way to conerete, prismarine and even gilded blackstone! Not only are all the textures hand-made in the vanilla style, but they also include many connected textures, powered by [Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm)! Inspired by the popular Chisel mod, Chipped allous builders to have their full range of creativity because every bock deserves a friend! To start out all you have to do is craft one of the seven tables that allow you to change various vanilla blocks into their chipped variants. All tables look different, but work the same, so you can pick whichever looks best in your build, or make a few different ones and spread them out in your home. Whatever you want to do, Chipped can help you bring it to life! --- ---
### Developers: Alex Nijjar, Grim, MsRandom1, CodexAdrian, ThatGravyBoat ### Artists: Kekie6, Marc-IceBlade, Shrimp, Facu, Frogipher, SunsetSoup, Valilla, Brother Earth, Joosh, ArtistMonster, Zilver --- [![The best way to play with your friends. Play with Essential Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/756fb1751d3dfa52c30b3df587894a9b99186e97_0.webp)](http://essential.gg/) --- ### Socials [![youtube-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/youtube-plural_vector.svg)](https://youtube.terrarium.earth) [![twitch-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/twitch-plural_vector.svg)](https://www.twitch.tv/terrariumearth) [![twitter-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/twitter-plural_vector.svg)](https://twitter.terrarium.earth) [![kofi-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/donate/kofi-plural_vector.svg)](https://kofi.terrarium.earth) [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.terrarium.earth) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/terrarium) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/terrariumearth/projects) --- ### Check out our other projects
